schema.title: Sample Plugin Configuration
schema.description: Configure behavior of the Sample Plugin. These settings are persisted via the admin panel and affect plugin behavior at runtime.

sampleSetting.title: Log Prefix
sampleSetting.description: Prefix used in console log messages when logging is enabled

enableLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
enableLogging.description: When enabled, the plugin logs lifecycle and event information to the browser console

threshold.title: Feature Threshold
threshold.description: Example numeric threshold used in feature selection behavior
